query: SELECT id, tenantId, companyName, companyDescription, products, industry, keyDifferentiator, onboardingCompleted FROM companyProfiles WHERE tenantId = 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3kmzwkq9EWMaqpy.root --database PHTFs288hUf3yaW9yWMkJw --execute SELECT id, tenantId, companyName, companyDescription, products, industry, keyDifferentiator, onboardingCompleted FROM companyProfiles WHERE tenantId = 1;

rows.companyDescription: Doctor Scrap specializes in the recycling and processing of various types of scrap materials, including ferrous and non-ferrous metals. They offer services for collecting, sorting, and preparing scrap for reuse in industrial processes, contributing to sustainable resource management.
rows.products: ["Ferrous Scrap Recycling", "Non-Ferrous Scrap Recycling", "Scrap Metal Collection", "Scrap Metal Processing"]
rows.keyDifferentiator: Focus on comprehensive scrap management solutions with a commitment to environmental sustainability and efficient processing.
